changeSet.author: mihail
changeSet.ext:cql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS distcomp.tbl_notices ( topic_id BIGINT, id BIGINT, content TEXT, country TEXT, state TEXT, created TIMESTAMP, modified TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (topic_id, id) ) WITH CLUSTERING ORDER BY (id ASC);

changeSet.author: mihail
changeSet.ext:cql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notice_id ON distcomp.tbl_notices (id);
